response.step_by_step_log: Analyzed the video for vocal music content. Confirmed that all audio is background game music and streamer commentary; no vocal songs are present. Divided the video into scenes based on Minecraft gameplay activities such as crafting, building, and farm management.
response.global_summary: Ninomae Ina'nis is streaming Minecraft, focusing on renovating a chicken farm and managing apiaries.

scenes.description: The streamer is crafting a ladder in her Minecraft base to fix her chicken pen.
The streamer is modifying the chicken pen area by digging and installing ladders.
The streamer adds trapdoors to the chicken pen for better security.
The streamer checks her apiaries, manages bees, and interacts with the chat while wandering around her base.
